holdings.infoBox: MNVT is an equity ETF with a total of 24 individual holdings. The top holdings are CleanSpark stock at 8.88%, Fluence Energy at 6.51%, Redwire at 6.17%, IonQ, Inc. at 5.80%, and Red Cat Holdings at 5.70%.

overview.description: The Moonvest ETF (MNVT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of global stocks. The selection process follows a contrarian investment strategy. MNVT was launched on Mar 17, 2026 and is issued by Moonvest.
